front.title: Extending Policy, Addressing and Numbering across Space Ecosystems (EXPANSE): Problem Statement

abstract.t: Ongoing IETF work on networking in non-terrestrial and deep-space environments treats addressing, numbering, and registry policy as a greenfield. It is not. Three decades of operational practice, registry governance, and routing security infrastructure exist, and any space-segment architecture that ignores them will recreate, badly, the coordination mechanisms the Internet already has. This document describes the problem and motivates chartering a working group to address it.
